screenSummary.playArea: The play area shows a flat map and a globe for exploring longitude and latitude on Earth.
screenSummary.controlArea: The control area has a Reset All button that returns the screen to its starting state.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Explore the screen by interacting with its controls.

terrestrial.currentDetails: The screen is in its initial state.

screenSummary.playArea: The play area shows a flat sky map and a celestial sphere for exploring right ascension and declination.
screenSummary.controlArea: The control area has a Reset All button that returns the screen to its starting state.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Explore the screen by interacting with its controls.

celestial.currentDetails: The screen is in its initial state.

screenSummary.playArea: The play area shows Earth orbiting the Sun, the ecliptic, and how axial tilt produces the seasons.
screenSummary.controlArea: The control area has a Reset All button that returns the screen to its starting state.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Explore the screen by interacting with its controls.

seasons.currentDetails: The screen is in its initial state.
